topStrengths: Clearly signals React and TypeScript experience.
Demonstrates cross-functional collaboration with measurable outcomes.

criticalGaps.gap: Missing explicit years of frontend experience.
criticalGaps.whyItMatters: The posting asks for 3+ years and ATS screeners often look for this pattern.

criticalGaps.gap: Business impact metrics are present but sparse.
criticalGaps.whyItMatters: Recruiters prioritize quantified outcomes to compare candidates quickly.

evidence.claim: Candidate references JavaScript and TypeScript proficiency.
evidence.sourceSnippet: I have shipped full-stack product features in JavaScript and TypeScript...

rewriteSuggestions.before: I have shipped full-stack product features...
rewriteSuggestions.after: Over 4 years, I have shipped frontend features in React and TypeScript that improved candidate conversion by 19%.
rewriteSuggestions.rationale: Adds years-of-experience and measurable impact in one line.
